finding: ATM git commit wrapper failed with ENAMETOOLONG when committing the large release root-drop update for ATM-GOV-0195.
expectedBehavior: Governed git commit should handle large staged file sets on Windows by avoiding long argv/pathspec lists, using stdin pathspecs where needed, or committing the staged index without expanding every file into the command line.
evidenceOrRepro: node atm.mjs git commit --actor codex-governance-optimizer --task ATM-GOV-0195 --message "build(release): sync telemetry coverage preflight artifacts" --json failed. commit-status reported errorSummary: spawnSync C:\\Program Files\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe ENAMETOOLONG.
followUp: Refactor the wrapper's git invocation and preflight pathspec handling for large release commits; add a Windows regression fixture with hundreds of staged files.
